name: Dispelling Sliver
description:
Activate F (concentrate)

Trigger Your Strike damages a target

Made from a treated sliver of cold iron, this talisman allows you to counteract magical effects. When you activate the dispelling sliver, it attempts to counteract a single spell active on the target (counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+29 #Counteract]]{+29}), with the effects of an 8th-rank spell. If you activate the talisman on a successful , the talisman attempts to counteract all spells active on the target, in addition to your attempt from Dispelling Slice.
